other_observers: None.; Walter Szeliga (finder), many other Boulder Co birders.
specific_location: Erie Reservoir, just east of Highway 287.
description: The bird was a large Loon, with a large, pale bill which it held at a slightly upturned angle. The top of the head and neck were brown, but it had a distinct, lighter auricular patch behind the eye. The front of the neck was light. The rest of the bird was also brown, with lighter brown stripes over the back.Behaviors: Sitting in a very small patch of open water on a quite small reservoir. The bird was mostly resting, but preened a little.Call: None heard.Plumage: Juvenile
